scope: unblock (partial): only the account-level apps stream (user_auth_key auth) is expressible in a single-auth bundle; devices/notifications/outcomes remain quarantined for a per-stream-credential ENGINE_GAP (see docs.md Known limits)

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: requires app_api_key (fallback rest_api_key) auth in the SAME bundle as the apps stream's user_auth_key auth; the dialect's base.auth candidate list is bundle-wide (selectAuth evaluates the identical candidates for every stream), and StreamSpec has no auth/headers override field at all (engine/bundle.go), so two streams in one bundle cannot be pinned to two different, always-required credentials
ENGINE_GAP: same per-stream-credential gap as /players (app_api_key/rest_api_key vs. apps' user_auth_key)
ENGINE_GAP: same per-stream-credential gap as /players (app_api_key/rest_api_key vs. apps' user_auth_key)
